name: clarity-guardian
description: Task clarity analytics and reporting tool for GitHub, Jira, and Yandex Tracker.

scripts.v2:demo: npm run build --silent && node dist/v2-report.js --demo --out-dir reports/demo
scripts.smoke: npm run build --silent && npm run build:smoke --silent && node .smoke-dist/smoke-test.js
scripts.test: npm run smoke && npm run test:tone
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run v2:demo && npm run retro:demo && npm run risk -- --input data/demo_tasks.json --output reports/risk_report.md && npm run readiness -- --input data/demo_tasks.json --output reports/readiness_report.md && npm run sprint-health -- --input data/demo_tasks.json --output reports/sprint_health.md && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
